[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0010100 2
4 0010101 3
5 1010101 4
6 0001010 2
7 0000010 1

01 0011111 5
